title: Isla's Peek-a-Boo Seasons
synopsis: Little Isla plays peek-a-boo with nature as she discovers how the seasons change around her favorite oak tree throughout the year.

pages.text: Where is spring? Peek-a-boo! Here it is! Isla sees tiny green buds on the tree.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes playing peek-a-boo behind a large oak tree with small green buds and pink cherry blossoms nearby in soft spring pastels
illustration.alt: Isla peeking from behind a budding tree in spring

pages.text: Where is summer? Peek-a-boo! Here it is! Isla hides under big green leaves.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes hiding under the full green canopy of the same oak tree with bright summer sunshine and colorful flowers in vivid summer brights
illustration.alt: Isla hiding under green summer leaves

pages.text: Where is autumn? Peek-a-boo! Here it is! Isla finds colorful leaves falling down.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes playing in falling orange, red, and yellow leaves around the same oak tree in warm autumn colors
illustration.alt: Isla playing in colorful autumn leaves

pages.text: Where is winter? Peek-a-boo! Here it is! Isla sees snow on bare branches.

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes standing by the same oak tree now bare with snow on its branches in cool winter blues and whites
illustration.alt: Isla by a snowy winter tree

pages.text: Peek-a-boo, seasons! Isla loves them all. Spring, summer, autumn, winter - here we go again!

illustration.description: A toddler girl with long wavy red hair, very fair freckled skin, bright green eyes surrounded by four panels showing the same oak tree in all seasons - spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, and winter cool
illustration.alt: Isla with the tree through all four seasons

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What grows on the tree in spring?
questions.explanation: In spring, tiny green buds grow on trees as they wake up from winter!

questions.question: What falls from the tree in autumn?
questions.explanation: In autumn, leaves turn beautiful colors and fall from the trees!

questions.question: What covers the tree branches in winter?
questions.explanation: In winter, snow covers the bare tree branches making them look white!
